use_cases: Toggle boolean values in forms with custom color theming
Select multiple options in multi-select scenarios
Enable agree/disagree toggles for terms and conditions
Filter selections in data tables and lists
Support bulk selection operations with consistent styling
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based checkbox component with custom color theming support through Tailwind CSS. This atomic form component provides standard checkbox functionality with custom primary color configuration, focus states, and accessibility support.
